_note: Non-secret request shape derived from Tool_TRreport and the first two sanitized M5B-0 packets.
The first packet proved that parent on /rest/api/content was ignored; the second confirmed the /rest/api/search CQL result envelope and numeric start/limit/size/totalSize pagination fields.
Deployment = Confluence Server / Data Center; authentication = Bearer PAT; REST base = /rest/api.
Never put a hostname, PAT, page ID, space key, identity, cookie, or Authorization value in this file.
The search expansion requests inventory metadata only: ancestors, space, version, and labels; it never requests page body or attachments.
If a live run exits 13, stop and review the sanitized failure; never alter selectors or page size during pagination.
